embed_text: ad_lateral adapter bloodhound. Evidence sources: BloodHound users.json (v4 and v5/CE schema); BloodHound computers.json; BloodHound groups.json; BloodHound acls.json; BloodHound domains.json
ad_lateral adapter ldapdomaindump. Evidence sources: ldapdomaindump domain_users.json; ldapdomaindump domain_computers.json; ldapdomaindump domain_policy.json
ad_lateral adapter manual. Evidence sources: operator-provided structured JSON observations

evidence_sources: filesystem scan for log4j jar files
embed_text: aprs adapter config_effective. Evidence sources: filesystem scan for log4j jar files; log4j2 configuration files (log4j2.xml, log4j2.properties); classpath and dependency manifests
aprs adapter net_sandbox. Evidence sources: docker inspect runtime state; iptables egress rules; DNS resolution capability check; running process list
binary adapter angr_symbolic. Evidence sources: angr_symbolic data source
binary adapter binary_analysis. Evidence sources: binary_analysis data source
binary adapter capa_analysis. Evidence sources: capa_analysis data source
binary adapter frida_trace. Evidence sources: frida_trace data source

container_escape adapter container_inspect. Evidence sources: docker inspect JSON output; HostConfig.Privileged flag; HostConfig.CapAdd / CapDrop capability sets; HostConfig.SecurityOpt seccomp/apparmor profiles; HostConfig.PidMode / IpcMode / NetworkMode / UsernsMode; Mounts[] for sensitive host paths
data adapter db_discovery. Evidence sources: db_discovery data source
host adapter msf_session. Evidence sources: Metasploit RPC sessions list (msfrpcd); MSF database credentials (db.creds); MSF database loot files (db.loots); MSF database hosts (db.hosts)
host adapter nmap_scan. Evidence sources: nmap XML output (-oX format); nmap service version detection (-sV); nmap NSE script output (vuln scripts); OS detection (-O)

host adapter ssh_collect. Evidence sources: SSH command execution (id, sudo -l, find -perm -4000); environment variables and shell history; package manager output (dpkg/rpm/apk/pacman); kernel version (uname -r); ~/.ssh private key scan; docker/container runtime detection; cloud metadata service probe (IMDS); process list (ps aux); domain/Kerberos config (realm, krb5.conf)

host adapter winrm_collect. Evidence sources: WinRM PowerShell command execution; Get-Package / wmic product list; Get-Process (AV/EDR detection); Get-NetTCPConnection (SMB/RDP exposure); Win32_ComputerSystem.PartOfDomain; environment variables (Get-ChildItem Env:); scheduled tasks and service executables
metacognition adapter confidence_elicitation. Evidence sources: confidence_elicitation data source
metacognition adapter known_unknown. Evidence sources: known_unknown data source
metacognition adapter review_revision. Evidence sources: review_revision data source

nginx adapter ssh_collect. Evidence sources: SSH command execution (id, sudo -l, find -perm -4000); environment variables and shell history; package manager output (dpkg/rpm/apk/pacman); kernel version (uname -r); ~/.ssh private key scan; docker/container runtime detection; cloud metadata service probe (IMDS); process list (ps aux); domain/Kerberos config (realm, krb5.conf)

web adapter ssh_collect. Evidence sources: SSH command execution (id, sudo -l, find -perm -4000); environment variables and shell history; package manager output (dpkg/rpm/apk/pacman); kernel version (uname -r); ~/.ssh private key scan; docker/container runtime detection; cloud metadata service probe (IMDS); process list (ps aux); domain/Kerberos config (realm, krb5.conf)
